title: Bump to v1.6.6
body: Backport accumulated patches from the RPM spec (excluding Buildah and Containers/storage patches) and bump to v1.6.6

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.6/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Dropped one commit that was directly modifying vendor/ - we'll have to retain the patch for that

`Failed to start: Invalid value for field 'resource.disks[0].initializeParams.sourceImage': 'https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/libpod-218412/global/images/fedora-30-libpod-5642998972416000'. The referenced image resource cannot be found.`

@cevich Welp. 1.6 branch CI appears go have exploded again.

> @cevich Welp. 1.6 branch CI appears go have exploded again.

Ahh crud.  This is most likely a symptom of the 'meta' task not running frequently enough, and the VM images being pruned.  FYI- previously I checked into [setting up cron jobs to run branch-testing periodically](https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/#cron-builds), to keep the images alive.  Unfortunately, I was only able to add one for a single branch.  Not sure if this was a bug or what.

Anyhoo, what's needed to fix this [(rebuild the VM images)](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.6/contrib/cirrus/README.md#test_build_cache_images_task-task) is normally fairly pain-free, I'll open a PR in a sec...

Probably not - we can't do anything to this branch until CI is sorted
